title: Project Minimap Hud
description: Integrates the player's ProjectE EMC and EMC change rate into Xaero's Minimap display.
body:
## 📖 About

This mod integrates the display of the player's [ProjectE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/projecte) EMC and EMC change rate into the display info of [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_0129a3df-1f7f-4054-be69-40d35061497a.png)

The display style of this mod is configurable, and we highly recommend that you install [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) for easier modification of the configuration.

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_d1cd2404-8019-4dcd-b643-a7d13775f74d.png)

Please note the supported Xaero's Minimap versions listed in the changelog.

This mod is part of my Minimap Hud series, which includes:
- **Project Minimap Hud (This mod)**
- [Apocalypse Minimap Hud](https://modrinth.com/mod/apocalypseminimaphud)

## 🎮 Compatibility
Should be compatible with most PE additions. Here are the ones that have been tested:

- [Project Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/project-expansion) MC1.21.1 ✔
- [TeamProjectE-Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/teamprojecte-reborn) MC1.21.1 ✔ (>= v1.1.0)

## Thanks

Thanks to [DonovanDMC](https://github.com/DonovanDMC) and his mod [Project Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/project-expansion) for providing EMC formatting templates for this mod.

Thanks to [lanAnderson](https://github.com/lanAnderson) and his/her mod [SeasonHud](https://modrinth.com/mod/seasonhud) for inspiring the EMC display style for this mod.
